programme.title: Svenske Truckers: Episode 402
programme.desc: I Gøteborg flytter spesialtransportøren Jonathan campinghytter, og været er ikke på hans side. I Stockholm er rotter et problem, og Max, en søppelmann, vil helst slippe å møte dem.

programme.title: Svenske Truckers: Episode 403
programme.desc: I Stockholm tømmer Max søppeldunker i kjendistette nabolag. Jörgen transporterer en 25 tonn tung gryte i Skåne, og veien dit er både smal og ujevn.

programme.title: Svenske Truckers: Episode 404
programme.desc: Spesialtransportøren Johan transporterer 30 meter lange trebjelker. Slamsugeren Magnus tar seg av en pumpegrop, en risikofylt jobb på grunn av de farlige gassene som produseres.

programme.title: Svenske Truckers: Episode 405
programme.desc: Anton kjører en grusknuser oppe i Norrland, og Amanda er på et kloakkrenseanlegg med kranbilen sin for å hjelpe til med å tømme en silo.

programme.title: Svenske Truckers: Episode 406
programme.desc: Max har byttet ut byluften med skjærgården, og dagens oppdrag er å tømme søppeldunker på Ingarö. To termoser med kaffe og Emanuel er klar for en hel dag i skogen.

programme.title: Svenske Truckers: Episode 407
programme.desc: Ingenting kan gå galt når Jörgen kjører en 70 tonns kran fra Värnamo til Helsingborg. Mickan kjører tømmer for første gang. Olivia transporterer kalver, men kalvene rømmer!

programme.title: America's Next Top Model
programme.desc: The final two models battle it out in a fierce runway show and the pressure is on as the final photo shoot is shot by Tyra herself.

programme.title: America's Next Top Model
programme.desc: Behind-the-scenes confessions, flirtations and meltdowns between the guys and girls are revealed in the never-before-seen footage.

programme.title: America's Next Top Model
programme.desc: Cycle 21 kicks off with girls AND guys back in the competition to take home the title of America's Next Top Model. 31 potential contestants rock the runway to see who can take the best selfie.

programme.title: America's Next Top Model
programme.desc: With only one week left to determine the Cycle 21 contestants, the semi-finalists tackle a rigorous Los Angeles subway challenge to model various seasons in a limited amount of time.

programme.title: America's Next Top Model
programme.desc: The final 14 contestants move into their new home, just in time for tempers to flare and relationships to ignite. Models compete in a revealing runway challenge where the wardrobe consists only of silly string.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team: Dette er sværingene
programme.desc: De nye kandidatene får en tankevekker om hva det innebærer å være en DCC. Jentene kjemper for å lære dansene. Melissa Rycroft treffer nykommerne for første gang.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team: Time to Push
programme.desc: With the first cut looming, the girls must push their dance skills to the limit; Melissa Rycroft works to bring out showmanship; stress increases on makeover day as the girls try to get the DCC look.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team: Big Surprises
programme.desc: A new choreographer shakes things up; uniform fittings and the Belk fashion show approach; two-time Grammy winner Kacey Musgraves stops by rehearsal.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team: Dance Intervention
programme.desc: Melissa Rycroft makes a house call to help Yuko; Kitty Carter rocks some of the candidate's worlds; cameos give Kelli and Judy a fresh perspective on the girls; at Show Group auditions, the girls let it all hang out.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team: Rehearsals with the Stars
programme.desc: Kellie Pickler comes to a rehearsal to share her experience and motivate the girls as Training Camp comes to an end; Melissa Rycroft makes Kelsey aware of a big mistake; Candace Romo helps with a big night of cuts.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team: The Finish Line
programme.desc: Squad announcement feels bittersweet as some favorites go home; the team has their first appearance at the Star Ribbon cutting; Game Day arrives.

programme.title: Casualty 24/7: Episode 17
programme.desc: Barnsley Casualty is facing one of its toughest shifts to date. With no children’s beds available across the whole of Yorkshire and a department filling up with poorly children the hospital is under pressure.

programme.title: Casualty 24/7: Episode 18
programme.desc: Registrar Doctor Gemma Hartshorne prepares to treat a man who has suddenly lost all feeling in his foot. Loss of blood flow is turning Roger's foot white - urgent treatment is needed to prevent amputation.

programme.title: Casualty 24/7: Episode 19
programme.desc: Trainee Advanced Nurse Practitioner Chantelle Proctor assesses a 49-year-old man rushed in by ambulance. Philip, who has a heart condition, collapsed at home and has been vomiting for the last ten days.

programme.title: Casualty 24/7: Episode 20
programme.desc: While people enjoy a most wonderful time of the year, Barnsley Hospital Casualty is open for business as usual, and the team are getting into the Christmas spirit. Consultant Doctor Julian Humphrey is leading the festive shift.

programme.title: Casualty 24/7: Episode 1
programme.desc: While Sister Jane runs outside to help a critical patient in the car park, Matron Val and Consultant Doctor Dave Walker need to negotiate with the Police who are stopping new arrivals entering the building.

programme.title: Casualty 24/7: Episode 2
programme.desc: Junior Doctor Tom Fish’s first patient is 18-year-old Lewis who has broken bones and deep wounds from a moped accident - but causing him the most pain is his fear of needles.

programme.title: Ekstreme samlere: Episode 5
programme.desc: Paul's hoard fills his whole house, room after room after room is buried under 6 feet of clutter.

programme.title: Dirty Home Rescue: Episode 9
programme.desc: Hayley Leitch and her cleaning team Tom Swire and Chesley Medley-Brown go to the rescue of Sue from Oxford whose house is overflowing with possessions. Sue married the love of her life in 2015, and he moved in, bringing everything he owned with him.

programme.title: Dirty Home Rescue: Episode 10
programme.desc: Hayley Leitch and her cleaning team Tom Swire and Chesley Medley-Brown go to the rescue of Linda and husband Andy from Bedau in South Wales whose house is overrun with animals and hasn’t been cleaned in 4 years.

programme.title: Dirty Home Rescue: Episode 11
programme.desc: Hayley Leitch and her cleaning team Tom Swire and Chesley Medley-Brown go to the rescue of Joanna from Birmingham, whose 2-bedroom flat is overflowing with possessions. Joanna works two jobs, leaving her no time to look after her home.

programme.title: Ekstreme samlere: Episode 1
programme.desc: In the picturesque city of Bath, Paul’s cottage is bursting at the seams with a lifetime’s collection of junk. Known locally as ‘boot cottage’ - because everything Paul owns and wears comes from car boot sales - every room is a no-go zone.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 14
programme.desc: It's a baptism of fire for rookie recovery op Callum when a serious blaze leaves an eight-wheel sewerage tanker stricken in a layby on the busy A1 motorway just north of Grantham in Lincolnshire.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 15
programme.desc: Lantern recovery op Steve Knight is on his way to a risky roadside rescue. A 38-tonne mail lorry has taken door step delivery to another level by crashing on a London street.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 16
programme.desc: There's a tricky situation for Recovery Operator Stephen in Warwickshire after an overnight frost makes a narrow country lane as slippery as an ice rink, causing a road sweeper to slide into a ditch.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 17
programme.desc: It's 4.30am and as Britain's network of roads and motorway stir the team at Lantern gear up for a huge emergency call out. An 18-wheel trailer carrying two portacabins has caught fire closing 3 lanes of the eastbound carriageway of the M25.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 18
programme.desc: Lantern Recovery Op, Merrie faces a dangerous challenge when a twenty-ton drinks lorry gets grounded on a boggy verge. The truck is stuck fast and initial attempts to pull it free leave the lorry leaning over and threatening to topple on its side.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 19
programme.desc: In Hertfordshire, Sean is in a race against time to shift a tractor unit and trailer fully laden with 27 tonnes of wood, after it left a busy section of road and toppled over into a muddy ditch alongside a row of bushes.

programme.title: Hundehviskeren: Josh & Boomer
programme.desc: Josh, a Maltese, will not let anyone with a brush or pair of scissors near him without putting up a fight. Boomer, a Chesapeake Bay Retriever, barks incessantly and refuses to come out of the pool.

programme.title: Hundehviskeren: Harry & Brooks
programme.desc: Harry wants to charge after anything with wheels, including passing cyclists, rollerbladers or skateboarders. Brooks, an Entlebucher, is constantly chasing after light, he is never calm.

programme.title: Hundehviskeren: Coach & Sueki
programme.desc: Coach, an out of control Boxer, bit a neighbor, seemingly sealing his fate. Coach gets a stay of execution when Cesar Millan comes to the rescue. Sueki refuses to walk on the leash.

programme.title: Hundehviskeren: Slick & Pepper
programme.desc: Slick, a rare white Puli, is full of phobias. When clients come to Christopher’s photography studio, they are greeted by Pepper’s annoying barking and heel nipping.

programme.title: Hundehviskeren: Ava & Gus
programme.desc: Ava, a Pug/Pekingese swiftly twirls for all occasions, possibly a neurological condition Cesar cannot treat. Gus the Bouvier greets people by throwing his 100 pound body at them.

programme.title: Hundehviskeren: Maya & Churchill
programme.desc: Churchill the Rottweiler is a well mannered dog, except when around other animals. Meanwhile, Maya, an affable Pit Bull, insists on being intimately involved in all operations of the household.

programme.title: Hundehviskeren: Bubba & Garrett
programme.desc: Heidi Wasserman inherited Bubba, a spoiled Maltese that demands to be taken everywhere and nips at anyone who tries to leave. Garrett, a German Shepherd, chases his tail, obsessively.

programme.title: Hundehviskeren: Emily
programme.desc: Emily, a Pit Bull, has become every owner’s worst nightmare – extremely aggressive towards other dogs. She’s so out of control, only Cesar Millan’s 6-week boot camp can turn her behavior around.

programme.desc: Marsha Alexander’s rescued Mastiff has ruined the furniture and intimidates anyone walking by his gate. Paris, a long hair Chihuahua, looks fashionable, but barks and snaps at strangers.

programme.title: The Hills: New Beginnings: What About Me?
programme.desc: På Speidis velværeanstalt går det rykter om at Kaitlynn er gravid. Brandon avslører sjokkerenede nyheter om forholdet. Familien Wahlers kamp for å slutte fred med familien Pratt, blir distrahert av mulige skjellsettende forandringer for egen del.

programme.title: The Hills: New Beginnings: Timing Is Everything
programme.desc: Kaitlynn knekker nyheten om sin graviditet til Brody, men er urolig når han og Kris skal møtes på fristedet. Pratt- og Wahler-gjengen håndterer endelig feiden som har delt gruppen. Justin får lære viktigheten av å vedlikeholde kontakter.

programme.title: The Hills: New City, New Drama
programme.desc: Når Lauren Conrad må mestre både moteskolen, en krevende praktikantjobb og en uforutsigbar romkamerat som ødelegger for henne, forstår hun raskt at alt er stort i Los Angeles, også hennes egne problemer.

programme.title: The Hills: A Change of Plans
programme.desc: Når Heidi fikser et intervju for drømmejobben som får henne til å overveie å hoppe av skolen permanent, forstår Lauren at hun og Heidi kanskje har helt forskjellige mål.

programme.title: The Hills: An Unexpected Call
programme.desc: Teen Vogue sender Lauren på et oppdrag til New York City, men vel tilbake i L.A. venter det henne en stor overraskelse fra fortiden. Heidi skjønner at å jobbe med festreklamering ikke bare er en fest.

programme.title: The Hills: Lauren and Jason: Part 2
programme.desc: Da Jason, Laurens eksflamme fra Laguna Beach, dukker opp igjen i livet hennes, forstår hun at hun kanskje ikke er så ferdig med ham som hun trodde. Samtidig, i sin nye jobb, spør Heidi seg om det egentlig er verdt alt strevet.

programme.title: The Hills: Jason's Birthday
programme.desc: Lauren haster hjem fra en lang Teen Vogue-event for å være sammen med Jason på bursdagen hans, men kvelden blir ikke som forventet. Audrina ber Heidi om råd rundt hennes nyeste date, modellen og skuespilleren Danny.

programme.title: The Hills: Boyfriends and Work Don't Mix
programme.desc: Jason utvikler seg til å bli et forstyrrende moment i Laurens profesjonelle og akademiske liv. Heidi får endelig mulighet til å jobbe i nattklubbene, men tidspunktet kunne ikke ha vært dårligere.

programme.title: The Hills: Somebody Always Has to Cry
programme.desc: Det er gjengens første ferie i L.A. og ikke alle får det de ønsket seg. Et nyttårskyss skal vise seg å bli litt av en oppgave for Lauren, når Jason finner ut at hun fikk en uventet telefon fra en gammel flamme.

programme.title: Ex On The Beach US: Welcome to Ex on the Beach
programme.desc: 10 reality- og sosiale media-kjendiser tror de er på en sexy heisatur, men paradiset blir et mareritt når deres ekser begynner å dukke opp fra stranden for å ødelgge hyggestunden. Tennes det gamle flammer eller åpnes det gamle sår?

programme.title: Ex On The Beach US: Exed Out
programme.desc: En ny eks ankommer med en hemmelighet som ryster hele huset. En av eksene blir stemt av stranda. Par (og tidligere par) møter sine verste mareritt når de må inn i Hemmelighetenes hytte.

programme.title: Ex On The Beach US: Two Exes Don't Make a Right
programme.desc: Huset må bestemme hvem som har det verst når en deltager føler seg fanget mellom to ekser, og en annen deltager må møte den eksen han frykter mest. En sexy date forårsaker kaos.

programme.title: Ex On The Beach US: I Wanna Call You Babe
programme.desc: Angela spør eksen sin når hun vil vite hva som skjedde mellom sin nåværende type og en annen person. De to damene som slåss over Chase begynner plutselig å slåss over den nye gutten i huset.

programme.title: Ex On The Beach US: Who's Exed Next?
programme.desc: I en overraskende vending får eksene all makt. Derrick legger planer og prøver å manipulere huset. To nye ekser ankommer, og en er mer velkommen enn den andre.

programme.title: Ex On The Beach US: Bye Alicia Hi Alicia
programme.desc: Corys eks Alicia kommer tilbake og forårsaker kaos i huset. En eks sendes til stranda for første gang. Skitne hemmeligheter avsløres i Hemmelighetenes hytte, og elimineringen overrasker alle.

programme.title: Pimp My Ride
programme.desc: In this episode, West Coast Customs pimps JT's Honda Civic.

programme.title: Pimp My Ride
programme.desc: In this episode, West Coast Customs pimps Jekara's Chevrolet Bel Air.

programme.title: Pimp My Ride
programme.desc: In this episode, West Coast Customs pimps Eric's Mitsubishi Eclipse.

programme.title: Pimp My Ride
programme.desc: Xzibit and the boys at West Coast get an unforgettable surprise when they discover a previous tenant living inside a neglected 1976 Pacer.

programme.title: Pimp My Ride
programme.desc: In this episode, West Coast Customs pimps Josh's Toyota Corolla.

programme.title: Pimp My Ride
programme.desc: In this episode, West Coast Customs pimps Heather's Chevrolet C10.

programme.title: Pimp My Ride
programme.desc: In this episode, West Coast Customs pimps Jake's Buick Century.

programme.title: Are You The One?: Don't Come at Me Crazy
programme.desc: Jada får raserianfall når Uche avslører at hun prøver seg på Clinton. To av-og-på-par er sammen igjen. Familiene til jentene deler litt pinlig informasjon.

programme.title: Are You The One?: Sinking Relation-ships
programme.desc: Nurys takler ikke at Malcolm og Diandra blir sammen. Huset er delt mellom sammenknyttede par som nekter å skilles og single som har problemer med å finne noen.

programme.title: Are You The One?: Ex-tra Cray
programme.desc: Kareem og Alexis presses til bristepunktet når Alivia og Keith utforsker muligheten for at de kan være et Perfekt Par. Ekser ankommer for å rote det til, inkludert en eks som alle kjenner fra før.

programme.title: Are You The One?: Tale of Two Players
programme.desc: Audrey blir paranoid når hun ser at Michael og Geles får kontakt. Malcolm blir konfrontert med sine sjekkemetoder, og huset begynner å utforske nye forbindelser.

programme.title: Are You The One?: No Love in Nola
programme.desc: Sjalusi blir hovedingrediensen i en vill Mardi Gras-fest. Geles blir alles verste fiende når hun prøver seg på flere av gutta i huset. Dimitri erter på seg Jada.

programme.title: Are You The One?: Love by the Numbers
programme.desc: Tyler håper at Nicole vil se på ham som noe mer enn en venn. Shad viser litt følelser. Alle i huset plages av hjertesorg og sjalusi, og henvender seg til Keith i håp om at han vil klare å pønske ut en vinnende strategi.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: The remaining four chefs sample one of Ramsay's complex entrees and then must re-create it correctly and two of the chefs face elimination.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: The cooking competition reaches its climax, Gordon presides as the two remaining contestants choose a kitchen team made up of their former rivals. Who will best organise their former teammates and lead themselves to victory this year?

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: Ramsay splits the contestants into two teams along gender lines and asks them to present their signature dishes, with the winning team getting to spend an evening with William Shatner.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: The men's team get a head start on the first challenge after some successful crab fishing, but can the women edge ahead when it comes to the cooking? Dinner service sees an infuriated Gordon throw an entire team out of the kitchen.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: This time, the chefs are given a rude awakening as they are tasked with entering an icy lake early in the morning to match up fish heads to their correct bodies. The winning team end up getting even wetter during surfing lessons.

programme.title: Walker Texas Ranger: Værvarsel
programme.desc: Trivette er ved elva – og vannet koker rundt ham – når han er undercover i fengsel og blir fanget med andre straffedømte under et brutalt rømningsforsøk mens en orkan raser. Nå må Walker finne Trivette før han blir avslørt.

programme.title: Walker Texas Ranger: I Guds navn
programme.desc: Alex prøver å redde en venns datter fra en religiøs sekt, men blir tatt til fange av gruppens karismatiske leder.

programme.title: Walker Texas Ranger: Kriminalbølge-Dave
programme.desc: Mens han leter etter Billy Clancy, en rømling han tidligere har hjulpet, får Walker vite at Billys tilsynsfører Dave Kilmer har tvunget Billy til å begå forbrytelser.

programme.title: Walker Texas Ranger: Siste jobb
programme.desc: Walker prøver å hjelpe en prøveløslatt person som vil få orden på livet, men som blir tvunget til å begå et siste tyveri av en korrupt tilsynsfører.

programme.title: Walker Texas Ranger: Familieproblemer
programme.desc: Walker kjemper mot en mann som tror han er uovervinnelig når det gjelder forbrytelser fordi søsteren hans er under vitnebeskyttelse.

programme.title: MTV Ridiculousness
programme.desc: Rob Dyrdek styrer serien, som inneholder klipp fra nettet, samt har kjendisgjester og medprogramledere som Sterling «Steelo», Madison Beer og danske Nina Agdal. Nye episoder hver onsdag.

programme.desc: Rob Dyrdek styrer serien, som inneholder klipp fra nettet, samt har kjendisgjester og medprogramledere som Sterling «Steelo», Madison Beer og danske Nina Agdal. Nye episoder hver onsdag.

programme.title: Teen Mom
programme.desc: Farrah tilkaller politiet etter en heftig krangel med moren. Amber lurer på om hun er gravid, og dermed kan glemme å fullføre skolegangen. Maci saksøker Ryan for å få barnebidrag, og Catelynn må flytte ut av huset til kjæresten Tyler.

programme.title: Teen Mom
programme.desc: Catelynn risikerer å miste kjæresten, mens Ambers kjæreste sier at han kanskje vil forlate henne. Farrah balanserer college, ny jobb, og å bo alene med datteren. Maci innser at hun ikke kan bo sammen med både venner og babyen.

programme.title: Teen Mom
programme.desc: Maci går ut med jentene og møter en gammel flamme. Babygråt og urealistiske forventninger ødelegger Amber og Garys romantiske middag. Tyler har dårlig samvittighet etter adopsjonen, og Farrah avslører en hemmelighet om barnefaren.

programme.title: The Hills: New City, New Drama
programme.desc: Når Lauren Conrad må mestre både moteskolen, en krevende praktikantjobb og en uforutsigbar romkamerat som ødelegger for henne, forstår hun raskt at alt er stort i Los Angeles, også hennes egne problemer.

programme.title: The Hills: A Change of Plans
programme.desc: Når Heidi fikser et intervju for drømmejobben som får henne til å overveie å hoppe av skolen permanent, forstår Lauren at hun og Heidi kanskje har helt forskjellige mål.

programme.title: The Hills: An Unexpected Call
programme.desc: Teen Vogue sender Lauren på et oppdrag til New York City, men vel tilbake i L.A. venter det henne en stor overraskelse fra fortiden. Heidi skjønner at å jobbe med festreklamering ikke bare er en fest.

programme.title: The Hills: Lauren and Jason: Part 2
programme.desc: Da Jason, Laurens eksflamme fra Laguna Beach, dukker opp igjen i livet hennes, forstår hun at hun kanskje ikke er så ferdig med ham som hun trodde. Samtidig, i sin nye jobb, spør Heidi seg om det egentlig er verdt alt strevet.

programme.title: 16 & Pregnant
programme.desc: Ebony fra Colorado Springs tar militærutdanning, men må bytte ut uniformen med mammaklær. Hun og kjæresten Josh vil inn i flyvåpenet, men en baby kan hindre dem i å verve seg, eller til og med i å fullføre skolen.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The Council pt. 2
programme.desc: The IMF continues its fight against organized crime.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The Astrologer
programme.desc: The IMF accepts a critical mission to rescue Nikolai Kurzon, the leader-in-exile of the Baltic state of Veyska who has been kidnapped by Col. Stahl (Steve Ihnat), head of the secret police.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: Echo of Yesterday
programme.desc: The resurgence of neo-Nazism in Germany takes the IMF to Bavaria, where Marcus von Frank (Hans Gudegast) threatens to become a second Hitler.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The Photographer
programme.desc: The imagination of the IMF is put to the test when a massive spy ring in the U.S. headed by fashion photographer, David Redding, threatens to cripple the country with a deadly pneumonic plague.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The Spy
programme.desc: NATO's missile defense system plans, mapped on two separate overlays for security reasons, are the target of a Central European spy organization.

programme.title: Boligkjøp i blinde Danmark: Episode 303
programme.desc: Charlotte og Mikkel bor i en så liten leilighet at dusjen må tømmes for ting hver gang de skal bade. Men nå ønsker de å flytte litt ut av byen sammen med sønnen deres.

programme.title: Boligkjøp i blinde Danmark: Episode 304
programme.desc: Pernille og Nicklas fra Odense bor så lite at hvis de trenger litt privatliv, så har de bare toalettet å ty til. Nicklas drømmer om å få et kjøkken med to ovner, slik at han kan lage mer mat.

programme.title: Boligkjøp i blinde Danmark: Episode 305
programme.desc: Wendy og Jesper fra Kalundborg bor allerede bra, i en leilighet som har en utrolig utsikt. Men en kommende familieforøkelse betyr at de må finne noe som er større.

programme.title: Boligkjøp i blinde Danmark: Episode 306
programme.desc: Jonas og Louise får sjokk når de ser hvilke hus de har råd til. Mads Mikkelsen og Tobias Edlev Nielsen jobber overtid for å prøve å oppfylle parets ønsker.

programme.title: Boligkjøp i blinde Danmark: Episode 307
programme.desc: Mads og Mia ønsker å flytte litt utenfor byen - men ikke helt på landet. Med Tobias og Mads sin hjelp kjøper de en bolig som har nøyaktig alt de ikke liker.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: Stockholm
programme.desc: When Tareq arrives in Stockholm he will meet innovation and world class gastronomy, a big city for foodies. He will make some pizza at the Rosendal garden café and go on an adventure in the archipielago.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: Lolland
programme.desc: When Michelin star chefs move from Copenhagen to the countryside, they often end up in Lolland/Falster. Here Tareq will meet Claus Meyer the father of new nordic cuisine and other entrepreneurs that opened interesting restaurants here.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: Skåne
programme.desc: Tareq Taylor explores his own backyard of Skåne and hometown of Malmö, a multi cultural food mix. Here you can find food and culture from all over the world that makes it a unique culinary destination.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: Best Of
programme.desc: Tareq Taylor looks back on some of the food adventures he has been part of in the program series Nordic Cookery. Tareq promises delicacies from all over the Nordics and meetings with fantastic people along the way.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: Läckö & Kinnekulle
programme.desc: By Lake Vänern you find Läckö and Kinnekulle, an area rich in history, culture and traditions. Tareq cooks exciting dishes on vendice roe, fish and local cheeses - all served on porcelain from the world-famous Rörstrand.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: Sjuhärad
programme.desc: Sjuhärad is nature and culture in perfect symbiosis. Tareq takes the bike to meet some of the food entrepreneurs in the area who have started exciting new businesses. Here you live close to nature, forest and lakes.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: Greater Copenhagen
programme.desc: Copenhagen and Skåne are a hot food destinations. Tareq visits Østergro, Denmark's first "rooftop farm" in the middle of Copenhagen, Eden in the new district Hyllie, Malmö and Häckeberga Castle where there will be wild boar for dinner.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: Höganäs
programme.desc: The wild coast at Kullaberg in Skåne has a lot of culture and gastronomy to offer. Fantastic ceramics, vineyards and world-class ice cream. Tareq visits VikenTomater and cooks vegetarian ragù

programme.title: Geordie Shore: The Family's Reunited
programme.desc: Charlotte er tilbake! Og hun kunne ikke kommet på et verre tidspunkt, hun havner midt i en dobbeldate og blir klar over Garys opplegg med Marnie. Den nye karen Aaron vinner en date med Holly, men avslører at han digger Vicky.

programme.title: Geordie Shore: Tash On Tours
programme.desc: Med Charlotte i hus igjen, tenker alle på Gary og Marnie og om de vil ligge sammen igjen. Gjengen tar 'Tash-On' - turer til Manchester for å vise Geordie-taktikken på singel-kveldene: Bli dritings og klin i vei.

programme.title: Geordie Shore: The New Boy
programme.desc: Det spisser seg til når Aaron overhører Vicky og jentene sladre om ham samme kveld han har tredje date med Vicky. Og mens gutta jobber ute, får jentene en kjempeoverraskelse - en ny gutt, Kyle, kommer for å bli en del av familien.

programme.title: Geordie Shore: A Trip To Iceland
programme.desc: Den nye gutten Kyle gjør seg hjemmekoselig i huset gjennom å tilbringe natten med Holly, og Geordie-gjengen og deres 'Tash on Tours' blir internasjonale når de flyr til Reykjavik på Island for utagerende festing.

programme.title: Geordie Shore: Marnie Exposes Gary
programme.desc: Etter å ha sjekket ut Islands gutter, jenter og geysirer, vender Geordie-gjengen tilbake til Toon. Der spisser det seg til når Aaron og Scott får høre sannheten om Gary og Marnie, og Garys tvilsomme guttekodeks.

programme.title: Geordie Shore: The New Boss
programme.desc: Buzzin! Våre favorittfestløver er tilbake og alle sjokkeres av at Vicky blir sjefen deres. Holly vil ikke virke billig, derfor vil hun ikke ligge med Kyle, og Marnie dumper Aaron når hun oppdager at han har løyet for henne.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Season 4 Reunion
programme.desc: Etter en sommer full av åpning og knusing av flasker, hjertesorg, 'lesbiotiske' kollisjoner og bilkollisjoner og drama som møter i veggen - gjenforenes gjengen for å åpne gamle sår og ta farvel med Firenze i dette eksplosive gjensynet.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Hurricane Situation
programme.desc: Medboerne kommer hjem fra Italia, og gleder seg over å være tilbake. Men et drama er i emning idet Mike truer med å ødelegge Snookis forhold til Jionni.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: One Man Down
programme.desc: Vinny vurderer om han skal bli eller reise hjem til Staten Island. Snooki krangler med Jionni, og alle er tilbake til gamle takter: festing og sol.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Dropping Like Flies
programme.desc: Deltakerne sliter med å venne seg til livet uten Vinny, mens Mike konfronterer sine indre demoner. Men det er også Paulys bursdag, og han får sitt livs beste gave!

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Free Vinny
programme.desc: Mike kommer tilbake, bare for å finne ut at Danny har truet med å finne nye medboere! Jentene leier strippere til Pauly og Mikes ville bursdagsfest, og deltakerne reiser til Staten Island for å kidnappe Vinny. Men vil han bli med dem?

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Nothing But Nice
programme.desc: Vinny kommer tilbake, og alle feirer. Mike prøver å være hyggelig, men ender opp med å irritere guttene. Snooki sliter med en ubehagelig situasjon.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: An Impossible Silence
programme.desc: When she witnesses a shooting, a deaf girl must decide whether to abandon the sanctuary of the City Below to free an innocent man.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: Shades of Grey
programme.desc: Mouse makes his first appearance - and is quickly shunned by the Family of tunnel folk for thievery.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: China Moon
programme.desc: Vincent and Catherine help a Chinatown beauty avoid an arranged marriage by escaping into the underground.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: The Alchemist
programme.desc: Catherine has reason to believe that a new drug on the streets is being supplied by someone from Vincent's world.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: Temptation
programme.desc: A beautiful attorney seduces Catherine's boss, Joe Maxwell, creating a serious conflict of interest.

programme.title: JAG: Fighting Words
programme.desc: A general’s comments about Islam during a church service pit Harm and Mac against each other as a court-martial hearing examines whether those remarks were a danger to national security.

programme.title: JAG: Retrial
programme.desc: At the request of Seaman Saul Wainright (guest star William Sadler), who is serving a life sentence in a federal prison for stabbing a transsexual prostitute 20 years ago, Harm convinces Naval authorities to re-open the case.

programme.title: JAG: One Big Boat
programme.desc: When a Naval Academy sailing team gets caught in a squall and a team member drowns, Mac and Turner must determine if their driven commander willingly put his crew at risk.

programme.title: JAG: Fit For Duty
programme.desc: Harm and Mac find themselves on opposing sides when a Navy psychiatrist is charged with allegedly sending a marine diagnosed with combat stress back to battle too soon.

programme.title: JAG: Death At The Mosque
programme.desc: Vukovic is sent to Iraq to defend a Marine who was caught on tape killing a seemingly innocent Iraqi civilian.

programme.title: The Love Boat: Love On The Line/ Don't Call Me Gopher/ Her Honor The Mayor
programme.desc: A woman seeks her boss' attention, a woman discovers feelings for her professional rival, and Gopher gets upset about his nickname.

programme.title: The Love Boat: Scandinavia Cruise: Girl of the Midnight Sun/There'll Be Some Changes Made/Mr. Smith Goes to Stockholm - Part 1
programme.desc: An American woman pretends to be Swedish when she meets an executive who's searching for a company spokesperson. Meanwhile, a woman mistakenly believes a man has undergone a sex change.

programme.title: The Love Boat: Scandinavia Cruise: Girl of the Midnight Sun/There'll Be Some Changes Made/Mr. Smith Goes to Stockholm - Part 2
programme.desc: An American woman pretends to be Swedish when she meets an executive who's searching for a company spokesperson. Meanwhile, a woman mistakenly believes a man has undergone a sex change.

programme.title: The Love Boat: Ace Takes A Holiday/ The Runaway/ The Courier
programme.desc: Ace's foot injury sets him upon the path to romance.

programme.title: The Love Boat: Getting Started/ Daughter's Dilemma/The Captain Wears Pantyhose
programme.desc: A young man makes a big mistake about what he believes to be his birthday gift.

programme.title: Happy Days: The People vs. The Fonz
programme.desc: His friends are baffled when Fonzie refuses to speak in his own defense after he is accused of manhandling a student and brought before the school board's disciplinary court.

programme.title: Happy Days: School Dazed
programme.desc: Joanie tries to help an angry fifteen year old girl kick a drug habit that threatens to get her kicked out of school.

programme.title: Happy Days: Open House
programme.desc: Over the protests of Richie, whose parents are out of town, Potsie invites three-stranded beauty pageant contestants to spend the night.

programme.title: Happy Days: Richie's Car
programme.desc: Richie persuades his father to let him have his own car and Fonzie comes up with just the car for him, a hot rod named "Love Bandit," which turns out to be hot in more ways than one.

programme.title: Happy Days: Not With My Sister You Don't
programme.desc: Richie's surprise over little sister Joanie's first real date turns to shock when he learns it's with Spike, a pint-sized replica of his Uncle Fonzie.

programme.title: Happy Days: Richie Moves Out
programme.desc: Hoping for more privacy, Richie moves out of the Cunningham home to share an apartment with his brother and soon discovers it's not the paradise he expected.

programme.title: Happy Days: You Go To My Head
programme.desc: Richie's fears get the best of him while he's reading a book on abnormal psychology and it drives him to secretly see a psychiatrist.

programme.title: Happy Days: Wish Upon a Star
programme.desc: Hollywood comes to Jefferson High when Richie wins a dance date with a beautiful movie star in a school raffle.

programme.title: Happy Days: Richie's Flip Side
programme.desc: Richie lets fame go to his head when he takes a turn as a disc jockey at the local radio station.

programme.title: MacGyver: Mask of the Wolf
programme.desc: MacGyver and Jack Dalton come to the rescue of an Indian who is kidnapped by fortune hunters seeking the secret location of a legendary mask.

programme.title: MacGyver: Rock and Cradle
programme.desc: An abandoned baby lands MacGyver and Jack Dalton in the middle of a sophisticated counterfeiting scheme.

programme.title: MacGyver: The Endangered
programme.desc: After visiting an old flame who's now working as a Park Ranger, MacGyver finds himself in the middle of a grizzly poaching investigation.

programme.title: MacGyver: Murderer's Sky
programme.desc: MacGyver protects a 14-year-old from the mob after his grandfather is killed for refusing to sell out his international shipping company.

programme.title: MacGyver: The Secret Of Parker House
programme.desc: MacGyver and old friend Penny Parker uncover a skeleton on the grounds of a mansion inherited by Penny, and MacGyver works to solve a year-old mystery regarding the disappearance of Penny's aunt.

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Ta frem bestikket! Fire fremmede konkurrerer om penger og tittelen som den ultimate vert for middagsselskapet, følg med for en spicy konkurranse.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder

programme.desc: Dr. Mark Sloan must solve the murder of renowned chef Rene Fontenot, however, with Rene being a ladies man and a successful chef with many competitors, the list of suspects keeps growing and Amanda finds herself among the accused.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: Gjenforening, andre del

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Rocsi Diaz XXXII
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' tilbringer Rob, Steelo og Rocsi Diaz en smertefull dag på vannet i 'Båtknekt', går ut og blir 'Terrassevrak' og manifesterer en del smeller i 'Dårlig tiltrekning'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Rocsi Diaz XXXIII
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' passer Rob Dyrdek, Steelo Brim og Rocsi Diaz godt på bakdelene sine, så de ikke blir 'Rumpestukket', tar rare omveier for å unngå 'Ville veisperringer' og går tilbake til Robs røtter med 'Skaterhatere'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Daymond John II
programme.desc: I kveldens episode av 'Ridiculousness' møter Rob, Steelo, Lolo Wood og gjest Daymond John nifse haier i 'Finneskrekk', vil ikke investere i folk som er 'Ikke banebrytende' og finner ut hva som skjer når man tar 'Slurvete snarveier'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Daymond John III
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' får Rob Dyrdek, Steelo Brim, Lolo Wood og gjest Daymond John pengerådgivning av 'Mini-Daymonds', møter noen rasende bier som skaper 'Biebataljer' og tester produkter i 'Prøv før du kjøper'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Lolo Wood XLI
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' blir Rob, Steelo og gjestevert Lolo Wood rådløse på sjøen og blir helt 'Havkorka', kaster for mange erteposer i 'Villvest-Cornhole' og må jobbe med egen tålmodighet fordi de 'Avskyr å vente'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Rocsi Diaz XXXIV
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' klatrer Rob, Steelo og Rocsi Diaz i feil trær med 'Døde greiner', klatrer opp på feil person i 'Dårlige skulderholdere' og blir intense på kontoret med 'Ekstrem kontorstoling'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Paige Desorbo
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' får Rob, Steelo og Paige Desorbo se noen ryggradpirrende fall i 'Ryggknekkere', hører hvordan Rob sparte penger for å flytte til California i 'Lagerleker' og avslutter med smerte ved vannet i 'Tørr landing'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Paige Desorbo II
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' vil Rob Dyrdek, Steelo Brim og Paige DeSorbo unngå å få nesen ut av ledd i 'Neseborsjokk', unngår små, gira råtasser i 'Helvete på plasthjul' og kliner til med noen frampå eldre damer i 'Sugne bestemødre'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Lolo Wood XLII
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' tar Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood sparkesykkel-kollisjoner til et høyere nivå med 'Sparkesykkelspark', konfronterer søppeldagen direkte med 'Vanskelig søppel' og snur uhell til hell i 'Utilsiktede seiere'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Lolo Wood XLIII
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' slår Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood ut håret med 'Partyrotter', ler av noen ordentlige 'Krimklovner' og tar en titt på ulike 'Krasjkamera'.

programme.title: Andromeda: Dobbel helix
programme.desc: Andromeda blir involvert i en strid mellom en enn planeten og en Nietzschean-koloni.

programme.title: Andromeda: Angel Dark, Demon Bright
programme.desc: En slipstream sender Andromeda tilbake i tid til like før Commonwealth faller. Mannskapet må gripe inn for å bevare historien

programme.title: Andromeda: Slipsene som blinder
programme.desc: Besvarelse av et nødanrop fører til at mannskapet henter Bekas bror, nå en Wayist, og hans venn.

programme.title: Andromeda: Bankene til Lethe
programme.desc: Et svart hull lar Dylan kommunisere med sin tidligere forlovede, 300 år tidligere.

programme.title: Andromeda: En rose i asken
programme.desc: Dylan er fengslet på en fengselsplanet og må utføre en flukt mens mannskapet hans prøver å redde dem.

programme.title: Andromeda: Alle store Neptuns hav
programme.desc: Castalian styrer Andromeda for å fullføre charteret for det nye samveldet. Når lederen blir oppdaget død, er Tyr hovedmistenkt.

programme.title: Forensic Files: All the World's a Stage
programme.desc: Police are dispatched to the scene of a shooting and discover the victim's husband is one of their own: a homicide detective who says his wife accidentally shot herself in the head.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Big Chill
programme.desc: For years, a woman suffered from what appeared to be the unpleasant side effects of lithium, a drug prescribed to treat bipolar disorder. When she died, investigators had to determine if her death was due to natural causes, suicide or murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Bound for Jail
programme.desc: A woman is found dead in a ravine, and crucial evidence has been washed away by severe thunderstorms. Twice, the trail turns cold. Almost 20 years later, an old hat and a chip of stainless steel brings the killer to justice.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sphere of Influence
programme.desc: When an 11-year-old girl disappears from a remote Alaska town, investigators wonder if she has been attacked by a bear or become lost in the dense woods. Eventually, they realize that neither assumption is true.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Nailed
programme.desc: Just weeks before a witness is to testify against the man accused of sexually assaulting her, she is murdered in the front yard of her own home. Investigators immediately suspect her attacker, but they don't have enough evidence to prove his guilt.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sign of the Zodiac
programme.desc: For six years, a serial killer prowled the streets of New York City. He wrote letters to police and The New York Post, indicating he would kill twelve people — one for each astrological sign.

programme.title: Forensic Files: True Lies
programme.desc: In the summer of 1986, Kathleen Lipscomb's body was found on a deserted road outside of San Antonio. Months and years passed, but the crime was never solved. Finally, a private investigator discovered Kathleen's diary.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Bed of Deceit
programme.desc: A retired police officer is found dead with a single gunshot wound to the head. His wife says the motive was robbery, but later tells police he committed suicide.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Smoke in your Eyes
programme.desc: A suspicious fire sweeps through an apartment, killing two young women. The cause of the fire and the identity of the victims are unclear, but a closer look at the scene reveals something hidden in the ashes.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Flower Power
programme.desc: Two different men called police to report the same murder. Apparently, neither one knew that the other had called. The investigation uncovered even more unusual circumstances.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries with Dennis Farina: Episode 5
programme.desc: This episode includes: Don Kemp Story, Moss Beach Ghosts, Kerouac Fan, Update: Marsh, NY State Serial Rapist and Baby's Breath.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries with Dennis Farina: Episode 6
programme.desc: This episode includes: Poison Pen, Champ, Li'l Miss + UD, Motorcyclist's Samaritan and Update: Shroud of Turin.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries with Dennis Farina: Episode 7
programme.desc: This episode includes: Son of Sam, 48-Hour Fraud, Twisted Sisters, Update: Train Wreck Amnesia and Miracle Staircase.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries with Dennis Farina: Episode 8
programme.desc: This episode includes: Dreamy Disappearance, Mom & Pop Murders (Pts. 1 & 2), Mystery Hum, Update: Missing Ex-Monk and Stalker Reward.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries with Dennis Farina: Episode 9
programme.desc: This episode includes: Marine Destroyed, Texas UFO, Lacrosse Star Murder, Larceny Lady, Update: Ladies Man and Phillip's Angel.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries with Dennis Farina: Episode 10
programme.desc: This episode includes: Sunnyvale Stalker, Missing In-Laws, Calling Dr. Fraud, Incredible Journeys, Update: Social Security Murder and Candy & Roxy.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Under Fire
programme.desc: A series of armored car heists and bloody shoot-outs shocked law enforcement. The brutal violence of the crimes suggested a motive more complex than greed. When the robbers started targeting police, the FBI took charge.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Deadly Threat
programme.desc: A suspected drug dealer would stop at nothing to keep local and federal authorities from building a case against him. When his organization started targeting the government itself, federal agencies went on high alert.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Family Secrets
programme.desc: A woman and her infant son vanish. The husband is frantic. The clues are scarce, but hopes linger, even as the hours and days tick by without a word. Was she on the run, or the victim of foul play?

programme.title: The FBI Files: The True Story of Mississippi Burning
programme.desc: Philadelphia, Mississippi, 1964. A sleepy southern town steeped in tradition finds itself targeted for invasion.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Global Pursuit
programme.desc: In Langley, Virginia, a terrorist fired into rush hour traffic. The victims seemed randomly selected, but the motive appeared to be political, targeting employees of the Central Intelligence Agency.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Broken Trust
programme.desc: A New York homebuyer gets more than he bargained for when a house inspection turns up a mummified corpse. For decades, the crime had gone undiscovered. The victim unmissed, and the killer unpunished.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Tools Of Death
programme.desc: Tool marking: A tool used to commit a crime can often be the same tool used to solve it. The pattern a machine leaves on an item, the unusual way a tool crimps a wire, and even something as innocuous as the shape of a wood chip can lead to a killer.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Out To Kill
programme.desc: An abandoned car outside Philadelphia brings heartbreak to a family and terror to a community. A young woman is dead, the killer gone. But the marks of his passage remain.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Death Grip
programme.desc: Fingerprinting: The Identification Division of the FBI relies on fingerprints as one of the most effective ways to identify criminals.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Blood Money
programme.desc: Some people murder for love. But these killers did it for the money. When greed is the motive, investigators must make every clue pay off.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: Underground World Of The City of Caves
programme.desc: The Ghost Dimension team ventures underground to investigate the City of Caves in Nottingham.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension Flying Solo: Dangerous Demon of The Stork Inn
programme.desc: Sean heads to Wigan to investigate a location with history dating back to 900AD. Encountering a spirit that attacks him, will the team be safe tonight as they come face to face with pure evil?

programme.title: Ghost Dimension Flying Solo: Buried Beneath The Bowling Green
programme.desc: Buried under the location Sean investigates tonight, is the bones of the deceased and it appears that they are at unrest. Will Sean solve the mystery of who is haunting this location?

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: Demons on The Buses
programme.desc: Hidden in St Helens, is a museum that is home to demonic and dark entities trapped inside of vehicles.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension Flying Solo: Not a Very Fun Day at The Beech Caves
programme.desc: Witchcraft, demons and ghosts have all been reported to haunt these caves. Sean investigates this network of tunnels deep underground and uncovers that all is not as it seems. This is not a day out at the seaside at Beech Caves.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: 16-Year-Old Surrogate Stole Our Baby
programme.desc: Sarah was Dawn and Derek's surrogate, but took off while five months pregnant. Sarah claims that they took advantage of her. Who are the baby's rightful parents?

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: She's a Crazy Stalker
programme.desc: Victor met Jasmine a few years ago but claimed they never had sex. Jasmine claims that they fell in love and want him back! Who's telling the truth?

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: These DNA Results Will Floor You
programme.desc: Joe met “Jessica” on a phone chat line. A few months later, she revealed she was pregnant. Then, Chastity claims that her ex Trent fathered her child. What will the DNA results reveal?

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: I Punch a Woman like I Punch a Man
programme.desc: Chelse claims that her 19-month-old daughter is Malcolm's and that he beat her while pregnant. Amber and Phillip accuse each other of being abusive and want the polygraph tests to prove their claims!

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: I Slept Around: Who's the Dad?
programme.desc: Tasha wants to prove to her ex Martin that he fathered her four-year-old. Martin's sister says that the child might belong to her boyfriend Terrence. Who's the real father?

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Bullied Out of School
programme.desc: Aabrea and Jerae bullied a high school girl so badly that she dropped out. Can Steve help them resolve their differences and figure out why so many teens turn to bullying?

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Weapon of Choice
programme.desc: When mother of two Shaundra Murr is run over in front of her house, officers initially suspect a hit and run. Until Lt. Joe Kenda uncovers evidence proving Shaundra’s murder was a crime of passion.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Slaughterhouse Six
programme.desc: Solider and young father Layne Schmidtke is brutally beaten to death by a mob of teenagers. Kenda must reconstruct the chaotic scene through forensic evidence and witness testimonies.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Last Call for Murder
programme.desc: Five people are shot in a cold-blooded robbery. With much of the evidence lost in a fire set by the suspect. An exhaustive manhunt ends in a chilling confrontation with an Eagle Scout turned killer.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Bullet With My Name On It
programme.desc: In his first year on the force, rookie patrol officer Joe Kenda quickly learns the ropes. But when he tries to singlehandedly stop a brawling mob, he finds himself facing down gunfire.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: End of Days
programme.desc: The discovery of a family home littered with corpses tasks Kenda with unspooling the paranoid obsessions of a diseased mind, and forces him to confront his greatest fear.

programme.title: Dr. G: Medical Examiner
programme.desc: It’s an early Sunday morning when a local resident decides to take a shortcut through the church parking lot. Walking past a lone car, the resident can’t believe his eyes.

programme.title: Dr. G: Medical Examiner
programme.desc: It is 3 AM and Deputy Torres is cruising a Texas highway when he suddenly spots a crushed pick-up truck along the side of the road. Trapped inside is the lifeless body of 24-year-old Luis Reyes.

programme.title: Dr. G: Medical Examiner
programme.desc: Carol Moleskie agrees to go on a hunting excursion with her husband, Bob. A few hours after they enter the woods, they emerge again, Bob frantically waving down traffic as he carries his bloody wife.

programme.title: Dr. G: Medical Examiner
programme.desc: It’s a late night and a Vietnam veteran with a history of mental illness is drunk and stumbling through an apartment complex. When the police arrive, he pulls a gun and shoots himself in the head.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Family Secrets
programme.desc: A woman and her infant son vanish. The husband is frantic. The clues are scarce, but hopes linger, even as the hours and days tick by without a word. Was she on the run, or the victim of foul play?

programme.title: The FBI Files: Master Plan
programme.desc: Willow Springs, Illinois, seemed like any other quiet Midwestern community. But it was really one of the most corrupt places in the nation. This tiny village, nestled just outside of Chicago, was in the hip pocket of organized crime.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett: The Framing of Sirhan, Sirhan
programme.desc: Was Presidential hopeful, Robert F. Kennedy really killed by disgruntled Palestinian Sirhan Sirhan as we’ve been led to believe? Or was he another in a long line of Manchurian candidates, a victim of a long standing mind control program.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett: Past Life Regression Pt. 2
programme.desc: Richard witnesses a municipal employee in Toronto, Canada undergo a regression during which he re-experiences a previous life as a doctor in early 20 century England.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett: Bible Codes
programme.desc: Does the Bible contain hidden messages encoded within certain passages of the Old Testament? Is the prophetic nature of these 'codes' proof the Bible's author is of supernatural or extraterrestrial origin?

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett: Journey to the Center of the Earth
programme.desc: Richard interviews the expedition organizer who is planning on leading a team of scientists, filmmakers and tourists to the Arctic aboard a Russian nuclear ice-breaker in search of an entrance into the interior of our world.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett
programme.desc: Richard meets members of the 9/11 Truth movement who challenge the official version of events concerning the attack on the U.S. Pentagon. Researchers present evidence to suggest the attack was perpetrated by some rogue element inside the U.S. government.

programme.title: Past Hunters: Razor Ruddock's Home
programme.desc: We visit the home of Soccer legend Neil "Razor" Ruddock which seems to be haunted. Is it his home specifically? Or are these ghosts attached to him?

programme.title: Past Hunters: Blackpool Pleasure Beach
programme.desc: Blackpool Pleasure Beach is one of the most visited attractions in the United Kingdom. People visit it not only for the fun, but to also hopefully catch a glimpse of the many ghosts that haunt there.

programme.title: Past Hunters: Whitby Hall
programme.desc: Built in the early 1800s, Whitby Hall used to be an administrative center and now stands as a public park and arts center. It has never before been investigated, but staff have reported many noises and presences among them.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: Thank You Very Much
programme.desc: Sydney og Nigel drar til Tyskland for å finne en tapt Elvis Presley-gitar.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: Transformation
programme.desc: Sydney, Nigel og Derek Lloyd drar til den peruanske jungelen for å lete etter Paracelsus-rullene som inneholder formelen for å gjøre bly til gull.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: Flag Day
programme.desc: Sydney og Nigel drar til Larivee, California for å finne Pioneer's Bear Flag.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: Emperor's Bride
programme.desc: Sydney og Nigel er i Moose Bay, Alaska på jakt etter den hvite jadesarkofagen til en kinesisk keiserinne. Sydney støter på andre relikviejegere Dallas Carter og Kurt Reiner.

programme.title: Andromeda: En rose i asken
programme.desc: Dylan er fengslet på en fengselsplanet og må utføre en flukt mens mannskapet hans prøver å redde dem.

programme.title: CBS News Roundup
programme.desc: The headlines one needs to know overnight... plus, a roundup of MoneyWatch, health, consumer and up-to-the-minute technology news, the latest weather, and inspiring stories of kindness and hope.

programme.title: CBS News Mornings
programme.desc: CBS News Mornings broadcasts on weekdays and offers viewers up-to-date news, comprehensive weather forecasts, and highlights from the world of sports.

programme.title: CBS Morning News
programme.desc: CBS News Mornings is a live daily morning news show that is anchored by Anne-Marie Green. Get ahead on the latest news by streaming the most important national and global stories first thing in the morning.

programme.title: CBS Mornings
programme.desc: Reporting on international news stories, interviews, and in-depth pieces, covering topics from news, sports, climate and technology to race, health, parenting and personal finance.

programme.title: On the Case: Campus Killer
programme.desc: When a young girl goes missing from her university campus, her mother is forced to lead an investigation for the truth. Can she find her precious daughter before it's too late?

programme.title: On the Case: River of Sadness
programme.desc: A heartbreaking mystery begins with the discovery of a young woman's body floating in Washington state's Yakima River.

programme.title: On the Case: Betrayal and Regret
programme.desc: After a teenage girl is found murdered in an isolated cemetery, police must untangle a dark mystery in order to bring her killer to justice.

programme.title: On the Case: From Dusk to Darkness
programme.desc: After a 10-year-old girl mysteriously disappears, her family and the police undergo a tormenting journey to find a lead.

programme.title: On the Case: A Nightmare in Laurel
programme.desc: When a young woman disappears before her final shift at a Maryland hospital, her family begins a decades-long search for answers.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT: Gear Up, Gear Down
programme.desc: Frustrated with her lack of flying and stuck in a rut as a courier driver, Audrey decides her time at Buffalo is over.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT: Big Boost
programme.desc: When a ferry breakdown causes a gasoline shortage in Yellowknife, new manager Duane begs Chuck to return and prepare the Electra for a fuel haul.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT
programme.desc: Duane lands a huge contract for the Electra and puts enormous pressure on mechanic Adam to prep the plane without the help of his mentor Chuck.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT: Top of the World
programme.desc: The Electra flies to Alert, the northernmost settlement on Earth, forcing Adam and new senior manager Duane to work things out.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT: Last Days
programme.desc: Sparks fly when Joe discovers Gord has taken a job with a rival airline after completing expensive training on one of the Buffalo planes

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT: Push Comes to Shove
programme.desc: Trying to make his mark at Buffalo, Duane lands two more Electra contracts. But his over- zealous efforts result in a clash with the crew and with Joe, and a down-to-the-wire midnight departure to meet a deadline.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show: Cameron Diaz, Leftovers Makeover with Pilar, In a Minute with Pilar
programme.desc: It's an all-new Drewber, when actress and entrepreneur Cameron Diaz joins Drew in her minivan to chat while cruising around NYC. Then, Chef Pilar Valdes is sharing her delicious makeover recipe for one of the most common fridge leftovers, rice!

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show: Drew Gooder, Drew's News
programme.desc: In an all-new Drew Gooder Drew has a big surprise in store for Deloris "NuNu" and Patrick "PopPop" Hogan who run a safe and reliable 24-hour daycare to help the parents in their community.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show: Drew's News: Food News, Biggest Design Dilemmas with Mikel Welch
programme.desc: Drew and Ross Mathews are serving the news sunny-side up in an all new Drew's News: Food News edition covering everything!

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show: Drew's News: Dr. Drew-Little Edition, Mac N Cheese Cook Off
programme.desc: Drew and Ross Mathews dive into amazing animal headlines in an all-new Drew's News: Dr. Drew-Little Edition. Then, competing viewers face-off in a Mac N Cheese cook-off you won't want to miss!

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show: Celeste Barber, Danny Seo
programme.desc: Comedian Celeste Barber, known for her hilarious celebrity parodies, joins Drew and Ross Mathews at the news desk to cover the latest headlines including the one perk employees most wish their employer would offer and share Rihanna's latest collab.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show: Drew's News: Health & Wellness Edition, Eyebrow Makeovers
programme.desc: Drew & Ross Mathews cover woman's library wellness check & how cuddling helps health. 2 guests get eyebrow makeover tips while Danny Seo shares paper recycling tip on Drew's News.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show: Susan Sarandon, Drew's News
programme.desc: Actress Susan Sarandon joins Drew to chat about her new country music drama "Monarch." Plus, Susan joins Drew and Ross Mathews at the Drew's News desk to help serve the news sunny side up.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show: Drew's News Beauty News with Zanna Roberts Rassi, Drew-Gooder Makeover
programme.desc: Drew and Ross are joined by beauty guru Zanna Roberts Rassi at the news desk to break down the latest beauty headlines. Then, in an all-new Drew-Gooder, Zanna transforms a busy mom of two and special needs teacher.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show: Abbi Jacobson
programme.desc: "A League of Their Own" star Abbi Jacobson opens up about her recent engagement, her bestie Ilana Glazer, what it was like co-creating, writing, producing and starring in "A League of Their Own" and more!

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show: The D'Amelio Family, Drew's News

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show: Drew's News Design Edition, "Hocus Pocus" Fun with Eitan Bernath & Leo Kelly

programme.title: 48 Hours: Did the Doctor Kill the Doctor?
programme.desc: A report on the 1993 murder of Dr. Linda Goudey in Stoneham, Massachusetts. At the time she was dating Dr. Timothy Stryker, who depending on whom you believe, is either a calculating murderer or an innocent man.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Friends for Life
programme.desc: A report about Robyn Davis and Carol "Sissy" Saltzman, best friends for twenty years, who were charged with murder after Robyn's husband, Brian Davis, was found shot to death alongside his car on an isolated road in St. Charles, Louisiana.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Road to Redemption

programme.title: 48 Hours: The Stranger Beside Me
programme.desc: In 2010, Jamie Laiaddee vanished from her home in a suburb of Phoenix. Her boyfriend Bryan Stewart told everyone she had moved to Colorado to take a new job. When detectives started searching for Jamie, they discovered Bryan was a con man.

programme.title: 48 Hours: In Too Deep
programme.desc: An examination of the story of Laura Hall, who was convicted and sent to prison for the crime of dismembering the body of Jennifer Cave in 2005.

programme.title: Cops: Safe Cracking
programme.desc: A man stages a sit-in in his car in an attempt to stop it from being towed. A homeowner denies that he's selling drugs despite the large amount of evidence found in his home.

programme.title: Cops: High Jump Fail
programme.desc: A family with kids is taken on a high speed car chase. An intoxicated suspect tries to jump a fence while protesting that he's not trying to run away.

programme.title: Cops: Bumming a Smoke
programme.desc: A runaway motorcycle tries to elude officers by driving on a rough road. An argument over a cigarette turns ugly. Kids throw rocks from an overpass at the wrong car.

programme.title: Cops: Neighborhood Rage

programme.title: Cops: My Bills Won't Wait
programme.desc: A suspect calls the police and states that he wants to kill himself and any officer who tries to help him. None of the three occupants of a stopped car will admit to ownership of a bag of drugs.

programme.title: Cops: Family Therapy
programme.desc: Officers are flagged down and alerted to a group of armed men assaulting people at a nearby home. A fight between a father and his adult son takes a dark turn.

programme.title: Cops: Spiked but Still Moving
programme.desc: A suspect refuses to stop his vehicle even after the officers spike his tires. A dispute over money results in a pregnant woman being attacked.

programme.title: Cops: Nightvision
programme.desc: A man on a late-night bike ride is stopped by officers for not having a headlamp. A suspect in a domestic dispute admits to hitting a woman.

programme.title: Cops: Now It's Lawn Furniture
programme.desc: A traffic stop over a broken brake light turns into a foot chase. A man handles bad news by throwing his furniture out of the window. A vehicle pursuit ends with a K-9 unit's help.

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: Crime Scene Solvers: A Deadly Date On the Internet (Ciampi case)
programme.desc: Marina Ciampi, 52, is found dead at her home in Marseille. The victim is naked on her bed, a plastic bag over her head. But no trace of a break-in is detected.

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: Crime Scene Solvers: Death Trap On the Road (Schaaf Case)
programme.desc: A damaged bike belonging to Karine Schaaff, 16, is found abandoned by the side of a road in Moselle.

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: The Strange Farm: The Anaïs Guillaume Affair
programme.desc: On the night of April 16, 2013, Anaïs Guillaume, 21, mysteriously disappears in Fromy (Ardennes) after spending the evening at her companion's farm.

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: Two Accused of Murder (Jennifer Charron Case)
programme.desc: On Sunday, April 29, 2007, the body of Jennifer Charron, 21-years old, was found burnt to a crisp in a forest near Royan. The young waitress, who had been missing for two days, was visibly beaten and tied up.

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: The Disappeared Of Nancy: The Julie Martin Affair
programme.desc: On June 30, 2014, in Nancy, the police are called to the home of Julie Martin, a 34-year-old nurse.

programme.title: Norske Krimsaker: Episode 405
programme.desc: To reindriftsutøvere fra Vest Finnmark havner i politiets søkelys etter å ha innrapportert flere hundre rovdyrskadde reinsdyr. Kan det virkelig være slik at de to har mishandlet dyrene sine for å motta erstatning?

programme.title: Svenske krimsaker
programme.desc: I juli 2022 rystes Mölndal da en død mann blir funnet halvt avkledd, brennemerket og med en båndopptaker plassert på kroppen. Politiet mistenker at noe langt mer urovekkende enn et vanlig drap har funnet sted.

programme.title: Norske Krimsaker: Episode 201
programme.desc: En augustdag i 1996 blir den 20 år gamle hotellarbeideren Trude Espås observert sittende på en stein ikke langt unna Geiranger sentrum. 11 dager senere blir hun funnet drept.

programme.title: Norske Krimsaker: Episode 203
programme.desc: Den tidligere artisten, flammeslukeren og TV-danseren Julio Kopseng lever et omsvermet liv i Oslos dansemiljø. Da han blir anmeldt for en voldtekt i 2013 utløses et skred av voldtektsanmeldelser mot ham.

programme.title: Norske Krimsaker: Episode 104
programme.desc: 10. august 2019 opplevde Norge nok et rystende terrorangrep. 21 år gamle Philip Manshaus dreper først sin 17 år gamle stesøster. Bevæpnet, og med uniform går han deretter til angrep mot Al-Noor moskeen i Bærum.

programme.title: Modern Marvels

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: The biggest machines and their smallest counterparts; Airbus A380 and microjet; Boss Hoss 425-horsepower bike and 18-inch tall pocket bike; world's smallest production car.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: All it takes to set off a booby trap is an unsuspecting victim lifting, moving, or disturbing a harmless-looking object; the history of booby traps from the ancient Egyptians, Chinese, Greek, and Romans to the Middle Eastern crisis.

programme.title: Auschwitz: The Nazis and the Final Solution: Liberation & Revenge
programme.desc: 1945 frigjør soldater fra den Røde Hæren Auschwitz-Birkenau. Når andre befrielsene finner sted i de påfølgende månedene, blir verden sjokkert.

programme.title: The Rise of the Nazi Party: Aftermath
programme.desc: In WWII's final months, Allies discover Nazi death camps, prompting a sweeping denazification of Germany post-war. Nuremberg trials convict top Nazis. Former Nazis are employed by the West in the Cold War struggle against the Soviet Union.

programme.title: Weapons That Changed the World
programme.desc: Today’s infantry demands a weapon combining machine gun firepower with rifle accuracy and mobility.. Host Wil Willis traces this journey through iconic firearms.

programme.title: Weapons That Changed the World
programme.desc: Special Forces operate deep behind enemy lines with top-of-the-line weapons.Host Wil Willis tests the Sig Sauer P226, the preferred choice like the Mark 25 by Navy SEALs, against competitors like the H&K Compact Tactical.

programme.title: Secret War: The Scholar and the Fight for Greece
programme.desc: Monty Woodhouse, a professor and a legend for blowing up the Gorgopotamos Bridge in Greece in 1942. In the British counter attack against Rommell at Al Alamein in North Africa it was vital to disrupt German supply routes, Greece.

programme.title: SvampeBob Firkant
programme.desc: Gratulerer med dagen! Vår kanalen har fått en 25 års logo får å feire bursdagen til vår kule favorite svamp! Her finner du eventyrene og bestrebelsene til SvampeBob Firkant og vennene hans i vann i den fiktive undervannsbyen Bikini Bunnen.

programme.title: SvampeBob Firkant
programme.desc: Gratulerer med dagen! Vår kanalen har fått en 25 års logo får å feire bursdagen til vår kule favorite svamp! Her finner du eventyrene og bestrebelsene til SvampeBob Firkant og vennene hans i vann i den fiktive undervannsbyen Bikini Bunnen.

programme.title: SvampeBob Firkant
programme.desc: Gratulerer med dagen! Vår kanalen har fått en 25 års logo får å feire bursdagen til vår kule favorite svamp! Her finner du eventyrene og bestrebelsene til SvampeBob Firkant og vennene hans i vann i den fiktive undervannsbyen Bikini Bunnen.

programme.title: iCarly: Tabber
programme.desc: Christopher Cane, skuespilleren som spiller Rex on Victorious, venner tilbake som vert i et dyptgående intervju med stjernerne fra iCarly og viser deres supergøyale tabber og bortklipte scener. Gjestestjerne: Rex fra Victorious

programme.title: iCarly: Fortsatt like gal
programme.desc: Ettr å ha fått beskjed om at Nora Dershlit blir løslatt fra fengselet, ser iCarly-gjengen på hva de kan gjøre for å holde sin gamle kidnapper bak lås og slå. Imens oppdager Freddies mor den virkelige T-Bo.

programme.title: iCarly: iCarly møter One Direction
programme.desc: Carly får en smittsom sykdom og kommer til å smitte et medlem i bandet One Direction. I mens skal Spencer trene en liten jente som ikke kan fordra å morsjonere.

programme.title: iCarly: Restauranten
programme.desc: Gibby åpner en hemmelig restaurant i skolens kjeller med Sams hjelp. Og Spencer designer en sikkerhetsrobot til hjemmebruk, som plutselig mister fokus helt.

programme.title: iCarly: Aprilsnarr
programme.desc: I dette spesielle aprilsnarr-avsnittet blir Carly og Spencer satt på gaten, så gjengen sitter og tenker tilbake på sin tid i Bushwell Plaza. Men minnene deres stemmer kanskje ikke alltid helt med hvordan vi husker hendelsene.

programme.title: iCarly: Dårlig stemning i butikken
programme.desc: Freddies nye drømmejobb i Pear Store blir et mareritt når Sam også blir ansatt. Imens prøver Carly å bli inviteret ut av en fra Pear Store, og Spencer må melde seg til frivillig jobb på den lokale brannstasjonen.

programme.title: iCarly: Halloween
programme.desc: iCarly-gjengen holder en "Halfoween"-fest, for de syns at det skal være Halloween to ganger i året. Men da en forkledd gjest spiller Carly og vennene et puss, blir festen litt for vill.

programme.title: iCarly: Chucks lillebror
programme.desc: Et sinna barn ønsker inderlig å hevne seg, men målskiven Spencer prøver iherdig å stoppe ham. Gibby blir knust når hans nye lekelaserpistol går i stykker, men blir fra seg av henrykkelse når Freddies reparsjion gir den overraskende krefter.

programme.title: iCarly: Utestengt
programme.desc: Når Carly bannlyser T-Bo fra hennes og Spencers hjem, hevner han seg ved å ikke slippe Carly inn på Groovy Smoothie. Imens oppdager Freddie og Gibby at det fins mange fordeler ved å spille i band...og også et par ulemper.

programme.title: iCarly: Turen til Las Vegas
programme.desc: Når Sam får vite at moren hennes er i fengsel i Vegas, bestemmer gjengen seg for å ta sine mest verdifulle eiendeler, kjøre til Vegas og pantsette dem - så de får nok penger til å betale borgen for henne. Gjesteartister: History Channels PAWN STARS.

programme.title: Cheers NO: The Crane Mutiny
programme.desc: Gjengen prøver å overbevise Frasier om at Rebecca er tiltrukket av ham.

programme.title: Cheers NO: Paint Your Office
programme.desc: Norm blir bedre kjent med Rebecca da han maler kontoret hennes i et forsøk på å nedbetale barregningen.

programme.title: Cheers NO: The Last Angry Mailman
programme.desc: En butikkjede vil gjerne kjøpe Cliffs familiehjem og bygge det om til et supermarked, men Cliff motsetter seg planene. Gjengen får vite at Rebeccas kallenavn på skolen var "Backseat Becky".

programme.title: Cheers NO: Bidding on the Boys
programme.desc: Sam og Woody byr seg frem for salg på en auksjon til inntekt for et veldedig formål, men de er ikke særlig begeistret over sine nye "eiere".

programme.title: Cheers NO: Puddinhead Boyd
programme.desc: Woody innleder et forhold til en gammel dame, som han møtte mens han var utkledd som Mark Twain.

programme.title: Cheers NO: A Kiss Is Still a Kiss
programme.desc: Rebecca mener at sjefen hennes har fått feil inntrykk av henne, og for å rette på det ber hun Sam om å bli med henne på et jobbarrangement.

programme.title: Cheers NO: My Fair Clavin
programme.desc: Cliff hjelper kjæresten sin med å forbedre utseende sitt, men angrer når hun får oppmerksomhet fra alle kanter, også fra Sam.

programme.title: Cheers NO: Christmas Cheers
programme.desc: Julaften blir en trist affære i baren etter at Rebecca ber alle om å jobbe sent.

programme.title: Cheers NO: Woody for Hire Meets Norman of the Apes
programme.desc: Woody prøver å overbevise vennene sine om at han har fått en rolle i en TV-serie.

programme.title: Mike Judge's Beavis & Butt-Head: En spirituell reise
programme.desc: Beavis ser ansiktet til Jesus i en nacho-chips. Det sender ham på en episk reise for å finne svar på det store spørsmålet - "Hvorfor får jeg aldri pult?"

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Nose Bleed / Vaya Con Cornholio
programme.desc: Butt-head tries some sadistic home remedies in an attempt to stop Beavis's nosebleed. / When Beavis turns into Cornholio in Burger World, Immigration Officials take him in as a possible illegal alien and try to make sense of his gibberish.
